volume.source: [ESTIMATE] words to minutes 10k-25k US/mo — derived from 15+ observed purpose-built competitor pages incl. essay-industry lead-gen tools. PENDING: Ahrefs capture [HUMAN], batched with bulk domain session.

serp.notes: Convert Words to Time - Talk Time Calculator — Ranked #1 in the observed SERPs for 'words to minutes', 'speech time calculator', 'words to minutes converter' AND 'reading time calculator' - the strongest cross-query incumbent. Fetched: accepts manual word count OR pasted text, toggles Reading Aloud vs Silent Reading, but offers only three fixed presets (Slow 100 / Average 130 / Fast 160 wpm) - no slider, no custom WPM. Output is a single min:sec figure. Carries a prominent sponsored/affiliate block (Wispr Flow dictation app). Brief intro copy, a 500-5000-word common-conversions table, no FAQ, no per-duration landing pages.

Convert Words to Minutes - Speech Calculator (Free) — Ranked top-2/top-3 across 'words to minutes', 'words to minutes converter' and 'speech time calculator' observed SERPs. Direct WebFetch on 2026-07-15 failed with 'certificate has expired' - the #2 incumbent for the head term is serving an expired TLS certificate, indicating a neglected, unmaintained site (same broken-HTTPS pattern as site #1's top incumbent screen-size.info).

TimeMyWords - Free Speech Time Calculator — Fetched: the most polished dedicated incumbent - modern clean UI with light/dark toggle, four fixed presets (100/130/160/180 wpm) each labeled with a use case, conversion table 100-5,000 words across all four tiers, usage guide, FAQ, Chinese-language support. Gaps: no slider or custom WPM input, no character count, no silent-reading time, practice/immersive modes advertised but thin, related tools listed as 'Coming Soon'. No per-duration landing pages observed.

Words to Minutes Converter - EssayReply Tools — Free-tool subdomain of an essay-writing AI service; the converter exists as lead-gen for the parent product. Multiple essay-industry brands (PapersOwl, EssayShark, Peachy Essay) run near-identical converters, confirming the keyword has commercial lead-gen value, but each is a template page inside a portal, not a destination tool.

Words To Minutes Calculator: Convert Word Count to Minutes of Speech — Tool page inside an SEO-content SaaS's free-tools section. Ranks top-5 for both 'words to minutes' and 'words to minutes converter' in observed SERPs. Generic converter with explanatory copy; the page's job is funneling users to the paid content-checker product, not serving speakers.

Words to Time Conversion Calculator | Voices — Free tool page on the large Voices.com voice-over marketplace - the highest-authority domain in the observed top-10. Oriented to voice actors timing scripts (cites ~150 wpm conversational rate). Rides marketplace domain authority rather than tool depth; a utility page supporting the marketplace, not a speech-prep destination.

Words to Minutes | Estimate Script Length Fast | BIGVU — Free-tool page on a teleprompter/video-creation SaaS, framed around script length for video creators. Lead-gen utility for the BIGVU app; from snippet a basic converter with marketing copy, limited depth discernible.

Words to Minutes Calculator - Speech Time Converter | Podcastify — Free-tool page on a podcast SaaS; another lead-gen converter targeting the same keyword with a podcast framing. Template tool-page pattern, limited depth discernible from snippet.

Speech calculator: how long does your speech take? - Debatrix International — Fetched: speech-coaching agency's calculator page - ranked #1 in the observed 'speech length calculator' SERP and top-2 for 'speech time calculator'. Paste-text input with in-browser privacy note, three presets only (Slow 110 / Average 140 / Fast 170 wpm), no custom WPM, no reading time, no character count. Substantial FAQ (words for 3- and 5-minute speeches, choosing a speed). Exists as a gateway to Debatrix's coaching services; strong E-E-A-T framing ('used by professional speechwriters') but frozen feature set.

Convert Words to Time - Calculate the Length of your Speech — Free-tool page in the learn/tools section of VirtualSpeech (VR soft-skills training company). Appears in observed SERPs for 'words to minutes', 'speech length calculator' and '1000 words to minutes'. Parent site also owns the top-ranked editorial page for 'average speaking rate'. Tool itself is a basic converter supporting the courses business.

estimates: main keyword volume 10k-25k US/mo [ESTIMATE] — no keyword-tool artifact yet

scoring_notes.C: TWO-PASS per P-01 rule (site-1 precedent): conservative pass 2, rubric-literal pass 3 (capped). Evidence for 3: #2 head-term incumbent speechinminutes.com serves an EXPIRED TLS cert (fetched 2026-07-15); #1 wordstotime.com has no custom WPM, no FAQ, affiliate clutter; 4/10 slots are SaaS lead-gen template pages. Counterweight capping at 3: two competent young incumbents (timemywords, speechtimecalculator) and active 2026 domain-farming in the niche.
scoring_notes.D: 3 — keyword+modifier for head term words to minutes (wordstominutes.com TAKEN); exact match only for lower-volume speech length calculator. RDAP-404 re-verified 2026-07-15. D-11 price check PENDING [HUMAN, bulk session].
scoring_notes.M: 2 — education/writing-tools CPM tier lower than electronics; student-heavy audience.
scoring_notes.B: 5 — pure client-side text math (word count / WPM), no dataset.
scoring_notes.R: 4 — no YMYL; -1 thin-content risk on per-duration pages requires genuinely distinct computed content per page.
